cards.back: A method of data hiding in images where the least significant bit of each pixel is replaced with the data to be hidden
A method of data hiding in images where the data to be hidden is encoded using run-length encoding and variable-length encoding
The least significant bit of a binary number, used in LSB encoding to hide data in images
A method of encoding where a sequence of identical pixels are replaced with a single pixel and a count of the sequence length
A method of encoding where each data bit is assigned a variable length in a binary code
